  • Eye Tracking for Everyone: iTracker
  • Revisiting Data Normalization for Appearance-Based Gaze Estimation
  • High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models: Latent Diffusion

  • Evaluating Large Language Models Trained on Code: Codex
  • Language Models are Few-Shot Learners: GPT-3
